summary: Admin Kids Check-in Station feature tested end-to-end. All backend APIs working correctly (19/19 tests passed). All frontend UI elements and workflows verified (18/18 tests passed including E2E flows). Fixed a bug in admin direct check-in endpoint that was missing child_name and parent_name fields.

fixed.issue: Missing child_name and parent_name fields when creating Checkin model
fixed.fix: Added parent lookup and included child_name, parent_name, and parent_phone in Checkin model instantiation

admin_page_route.details: Admin Kids Check-in page loads at /kids-checkin route with proper authentication

navigation_link.details: Kids Check-in link appears under MINISTRY section in sidebar navigation

header_display.details: Header shows 'Kids Check-in Station' title with 'Front Desk Management' subtitle and real-time checked-in count

three_tabs.details: All three tabs present and functional with proper switching

currently_checked_in_tab.details: Shows child cards with pickup codes, check-in time, parent info, and Check Out button

check_in_tab.details: Shows search input and list of kids not yet checked in with direct Check In button

check_out_tab.details: Shows pickup code input with Verify Code button and displays verification results

verify_code_api.details: Returns child info for valid codes, returns valid=false for invalid codes

release_child_button.details: Appears after valid code verification and completes checkout flow

direct_checkout_button.details: Check Out button on child cards opens confirmation modal

checkout_modal.details: Shows confirmation modal with child name, pickup code, Cancel and Confirm Checkout buttons

direct_admin_checkin.details: Admin can check in children directly from Check In tab

auto_refresh.details: Page auto-refreshes data every 30 seconds, manual refresh button also available

details: test_get_all_kids_admin - GET /api/admin/kids/all returns all registered children
test_verify_invalid_pickup_code - Returns valid=false for invalid codes

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed admin_checkin_child endpoint to include child_name and parent_name
seed_data_creation: Used existing test children (Test Kid 123, Emma Johnson) for E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Kids Check-in Station is fully functional. All API endpoints work correctly with proper authentication (admin required, member denied). The UI has three tabs: Currently Checked In (shows child cards with pickup codes), Check In (allows direct admin check-in), and Check Out (verify pickup code and release child). CSS classes use .kca- prefix. Twilio SMS notifications are MOCKED - logged to backend console.

mocked_apis_note.twilio_sms: MOCKED - SMS notifications logged to backend console
mocked_apis_note.note: This is intentional for demo/preview environment. SMS would be: [MOCK SMS] To: {phone} Message: Hi {parent}! {child} has been checked into Sunday School...
